creator: ache@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Feb 21, 2000 at 05:22:26AM -0800, tkato@prontomail.ne.jp wrote:
> +CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--enable-shared --with-bzlib=no --with-dps=no --with-fpx=no \
> +		--with-perl=${PERL5}
> -CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--prefix=${PREFIX} --enable-lzw --enable-shared --with-perl=${PERL5}

--enable-lzw should not be taken out blindly. Please use something like
.if defined(HAVE_LZW_LICENSE)
CONFIGURE_ARGS += --enable-lzw
.endif

-- 
Andrey A. Chernov
<ache@nagual.pp.ru>
http://nagual.pp.ru/~ache/
